name: pando-proxy
description: By pando (https://getpando.ai) — free for personal/noncommercial use under PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0; commercial use requires a license, contact camellia@human.software. Run Codex through a local OpenAI Responses-compatible memory proxy with one npx command. Maintains a compact working memory (one live objective + exact retained chunks) across rounds, aggressively prunes at end of turn, and exposes an optional local memory(offset, limit) fallback tool. Wraps `codex` transparently: all Codex subcommands and flags (exec, resume, fork, login, mcp, app-server, --sandbox, --model, -c, ...) are passed through unchanged; proxy-specific options are prefixed with --proxy-*.
